plugins.microphonePermission: Allow this app to access the microphone for voice search.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow this app to recognize speech for voice search.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow this app to access your camera to scan QR codes and capture images for search.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow this app to access your photos to select images for visual search.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow this app to save downloaded images to your photo gallery.
